title: Port SubdivideMesh and modifier nodes to ArrayMesh
description: Rewrite SubdivideMeshNode.subdivideOnce to operate on ArrayMesh with flat array arithmetic — pre-compute output size, allocate float[outV*3] + int[outF*4], fill in one pass. No addVertex/addFace calls, no HashMap growth. Port SetPosition, DeleteGeometry, MergeByDistance, JoinGeometry, InstanceOnPoints, CaptureAttribute likewise. All modifier and geometry nodes should consume and produce ArrayMesh instead of HalfEdgeMesh. The rendering pipeline already has ArrayMesh.compileSurfaceData() for GPU upload.
definition-of-done: 1. SubdivideMeshNode produces ArrayMesh. Subdivision level 8 completes in <2s with <1GB heap. 2. All modifier/geometry nodes (SetPosition, DeleteGeometry, MergeByDistance, JoinGeometry, InstanceOnPoints, CaptureAttribute) produce ArrayMesh. 3. GeometryBundle wraps ArrayMesh instead of HalfEdgeMesh. 4. HalfEdgeMesh is only used for rendering (via compileSurfaceData or toHalfEdgeMesh at the end). 5. All mesh tests pass. 6. tool_quilt.dsl at subdivision level 6 runs without OOM at -Xmx1g.
testing-plan: 1. Run all existing mesh tests, verify pass. 2. Run ToolQuiltDslTest at subdivision level 6 with -Xmx1g, verify no OOM. 3. Benchmark subdivision at level 8, verify <2s. 4. Compare mesh fingerprint at level 4 against the old HalfEdgeMesh implementation to verify identical geometry.
todos: Port SubdivideMeshNode to use ArrayMesh factory from DSL-4
Port SetPositionNode to modify ArrayMesh positions in-place
Port DeleteGeometryNode to use ArrayMesh delete factories
Port MergeByDistanceNode to use ArrayMesh merge factory
Port JoinGeometryNode to use ArrayMesh join factory
Port InstanceOnPointsNode to build ArrayMesh directly
Port CaptureAttributeNode to work with ArrayMesh bundles
Update GeometryBundle to use ArrayMesh as primary mesh type
Add HalfEdgeMesh conversion only at the rendering boundary
Run benchmarks and verify memory targets
unknowns: Whether all nodes need porting at once or can be done incrementally with MeshTopology interface bridging
Whether InstanceOnPoints needs the full CSR topology from ArrayMesh or can work from positions alone
